name: Perfect Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose your preferred bean variety (Pinto, navy, Great Northern White, etc.).
2. Pick over the beans to remove any rocks or damaged beans. Wash and place them in a large pot with 1 cup of sugar and enough cold water to cover.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 3 hours or until tender. Add additional water as needed.
4. Slice the sausage and onion, dice the garlic and peppers (adjust the number of peppers based on preference).
5. Add all remaining ingredients and cook the beans for at least 1 more hour, stirring occasionally and adding water as needed.
6. Adjust salt to taste. Initially, ensure there is enough water—about twice as deep as the beans—to prevent burning.
7. After the beans have swollen, keep them just covered with liquid during cooking. If they burn accidentally, do not stir; transfer to another pot carefully, avoiding burned particles and continue cooking.
